title: Accessing the VFI Control Panel
description: The VFI Service on Apiculus is delivered as an integration using OS images pre-loaded with pfSense or FortiGate VM. While adding Instances to the VFI-based network is possible from the Apiculus Cloud Console UI, networking configurations need to be handled by accessing the VFI control panel UI.

previous.title: Adding Instances to a Virtual-Firewall-Based Network
